tests.name: UnifiedSearcher > doSearchQuery pagination > should report isItemLoaded correctly
UnifiedSearcher > getFolderViewSort > should return "name_sort"
UnifiedSearcher > getSortOptions > should include enterprise sort options when analytics is enabled
UnifiedSearcher > getSortOptions > should only return 2 options when analytics is disabled
UnifiedSearcher > getSortOptions > should return alphabetical sort options by default
UnifiedSearcher > search > should default limit to 50 when not specified
UnifiedSearcher > search > should fall back when backend returns Loading frame
UnifiedSearcher > search > should handle empty response frames
UnifiedSearcher > search > should return results from the unified search API
UnifiedSearcher > search > should set default meta when custom meta is missing
UnifiedSearcher > search > should throw error when facets are requested
UnifiedSearcher > search > should use default query "*" when query is undefined
UnifiedSearcher > search > should use provided limit when specified
UnifiedSearcher > starred > should fetch stars from api/user/stars
UnifiedSearcher > starred > should return empty response when no stars exist
UnifiedSearcher > starred > should return empty response when stars API returns null
UnifiedSearcher > starred > should search with starred UIDs when stars exist
UnifiedSearcher > starred > should throw error when facets are requested
UnifiedSearcher > starred > should use default query "*" when query.query is undefined
UnifiedSearcher > tags > should fall back when Loading frame is returned
UnifiedSearcher > tags > should post with facet tag and limit 1
UnifiedSearcher > tags > should return empty array when no tag frame is found
UnifiedSearcher > tags > should return tag counts from the response
getGrafanaSearcher > should return FrontendSearcher when panelTitleSearch and do-frontend-query are active
getGrafanaSearcher > should return SQLSearcher when no feature toggles are enabled
getGrafanaSearcher > should return UnifiedSearcher when unifiedStorageSearch is enabled
